title: Fancy Create
description: Come and check out my modpack...
body:
![Create Fancy Modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aFqS0yJi/images/ea908e4441be5f8a59797452166521dad11546e7.png 'Create Fancy Modpack')
Welcome to the **CREATE FANCY MODPACK**. The new modpack that I created. Dive into the world and create your mega bases. This modpack works on two modloaders. Forge and Fabric. The modpack feels like normal Minecraft, but better. That means you can do everything that you want. Let's get to the other part. 
![Forge Version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aFqS0yJi/images/1f199cc37e84b621fa123c71282bc03e6939f1fa.png
'Forge Version')
Let's dive into the **FORGE** version. The Forge version is typical for weaker computers. There will be a version with shaders. In the modpack there is a lot of modded stuff. Modpack has Embeddium and add-ons for it. There is the Create mod and FPS Reducer that will reduce unnecessary GPU and CPU load by reducing the frame rate automatically when the client window is inactive or you are not operating Minecraft for a certain period of time (optional from v2.0). As soon as the user performs any operation, it returns to the original frame rate. Credits for description. 
![Fabric Version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aFqS0yJi/images/3adb4b75908758a7527911c9777bd145b79f80e8.png
'Fabric Version')
Let's dive into the **FABRIC** version. Fabric version is typical for more powerful computers. In the modpack there is a create mod, a lot of addons and a lot of decorative blocks. Also, it has an FPS Reducer like in the Forge version. There is a sodium and Indium that allow you to use shaders. Simple Backpack is also here.
![Download NOW!!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aFqS0yJi/images/948828a40ae4ad1fcee971c48353743c2efab56d.png
'Download NOW!!!')
